Taxes are Beautiful

Taxes are Beautiful

A project by Gerry Chu

Do not use this tool to file or calculate your taxes. It is in no way guaranteed to be complete or accurate. It is a fun visualization tool only.

I built this tool for tax planning. To do tax planning, I needed to have some conception of how income taxes are calculated. I also wondered why inputting some numbers into the tax prep software changed my income tax, while inputting others didn't change it at all. Clearly there is a non-linear relationship!

Conventional tax planning software purposely obscures the nitty-gritty of how taxes are calculated in the name of simplicity. For good reason! The US tax code is fiendishly complex and full of loopholes and carve-outs. But if you want to "debug" your return, you quickly run into The Law of Leaky Abstractions.

I also felt the step-by-step UI of tax planning software to be plodding at times. Just let me enter in all the forms I have at at the same time, dammit!

Feedback and bug reports are appreciated at gerry@gerrychu.com

Limitations

Supported

  • Single and married filing jointly
  • Income tax, ordinary and preferred
  • Social security tax, overpayments
  • Medicare tax
  • W-2 withholdings
  • Ordinary dividends (qualified and non-qualified)
  • Section 199A dividends
  • QBI, subject to cap
  • Short and long term cap gains and deduction cap
  • Capital loss carryovers, previous and next year
  • Student loan interest, subject to MAGI phaseout
  • Mortgage interest, subject to debt cap
  • Property taxes, subject to cap
  • Other state and local taxes, subject to cap
  • Charitable donations, subject to cap

Not supported

  • Kids and other dependents
  • Earned income tax credit
  • AMT
  • NIIT
  • Estimated tax
  • Rentals
  • Businesses
  • Everything else
Built by Gerry Chu  ·  Not for tax filing — for educational purposes only
